summary: A direct, wide 4-3-3 with creative crossing but a habit of missing big chances. Bafana Bafana bring exciting match-ups to Group A.
style: 4-3-3 — can be very direct (2nd most long passes), wingers in 1v1s with fullbacks beyond, creative crossing (2nd best crossers).

counterReliance.note: Direct, can go long quickly into wide 1v1s

strengths: Direct outlet — among the most long passes of the field
Creative wide play and crossing volume
weaknesses: Wasteful — most big chances missed in qualifying

keyPlayers.name: Oswin Appollis
keyPlayers.note: Pacey, direct dribbler (56% success), creativity & goals — 6 goal involvements in 5

tactics: Happy to go direct, releasing wingers into 1v1s with fullbacks overlapping beyond. Plenty of crosses but the conversion needs to improve. Solid rest-defence keeps them in games.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
